title: Vranje, Pčinja — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Vranje, Pčinja: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Vranje is a city in Pčinja with a population of 55,000. A city in southern Serbia near the North Macedonian border, known for its Ottoman-era architecture, the White Bridge, and the Pržar spa.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
